comment: I have used this app for years and love the search feature and person/pet recognition. The memories and short videos it creates automatically are fun! Editing capabilities are getting better, but still no way to adjust exposure. A recent update added extra (security?) steps before saving edited images or deleting from the app - very annoying! I will be looking for a new app to manage my photos if this isn't resolved.
key sentence: The key words from the comment are: "search feature", "person/pet recognition", "memories", "short videos", "editing capabilities", "adjust exposure", "update", "extra steps", "security", "saving edited images", "deleting from the app", "annoying", "looking for a new app".
the function of activity: This activity allows users to navigate to library/memories/search, cast content, back up photos, favorite items, and access various editing and sharing options.
